name: InputGroupComponent
description:
The component that represents an input group.
The input group includes form inputs with add-ons that allow the user to better understand the information being entered.

```html
<fd-input-group placement="after" addOnText="$" placeholder="Amount">
</fd-input-group>
```

inputs.name: addonButtonAriaHidden
inputs.description:
Whether the input group addon button should be aria-hidden
Useful in cases when the title is already applied on the
input group parent component

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: the associated ids for the input aria-labelledby field

inputs.name: button
inputs.description: Whether the icon add-on or the text add-on is a button.

inputs.name: buttonFocusable
inputs.description: Whether AddOn Button should be focusable

inputs.name: glyph
inputs.description: The icon value for the add-on.

inputs.name: glyphAriaLabel
inputs.description: Label applied to button with glyph element.

inputs.name: iconTitle
inputs.deprecated: Title attributes are being removed from the library.

inputs.name: inline
inputs.description: Whether the input group is inline.

inputs.name: isControl
inputs.description: Whether the input group is a popover control

inputs.name: placement
inputs.description:
The placement of the add-on.
Options include *before* and *after*

inputs.name: type
inputs.description: The type of the input, used in Input Group. By default, value is set to 'text'

outputs.name: addOnButtonClicked
outputs.description: Event emitted when the add-on button is clicked.

outputs.name: search
outputs.description:
Event emitted when the native clear button is clicked, or when native search is executed.
Works only for native search for input[type="search"]
